lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਸੁਣੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: hoe deaal kirapaal prabh tthaakur aape sunai benantee |
lines.english: Becoming kind and compassionate, God the Lord and Master Himself listens to my prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਸਭ ਚੂਕੈ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਚਿੰਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa satagur mel milaavai sabh chookai man kee chintee |
lines.english: He unites me in Union with the Perfect True Guru, and all the cares and anxieties of my mind are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਵਖਦੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਸੰਤੀ ॥੪॥੧੨॥੬੨॥
lines.translit: har har naam avakhad mukh paaeaa jan naanak sukh vasantee |4|12|62|
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, has placed the medicine of the Naam into my mouth; servant Nanak abides in peace. ||4||12||62||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਏ ਅਨੰਦਾ ਦੁਖ ਕਲੇਸ ਸਭਿ ਨਾਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar prabh bhe anandaa dukh kales sabh naatthe |
lines.english: Remembering, remembering God in meditation, bliss ensues, and one is rid of all suffering and pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਤ ਧਿਆਵਤ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਗਲੇ ਸਾਂਠੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gun gaavat dhiaavat prabh apanaa kaaraj sagale saantthe |1|
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of God, and meditating on Him, all my affairs are brought into harmony. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਦੀਓ ਉਪਦੇਸਾ ਜਪਿ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore deeo upadesaa jap bhaujal paar utaaraa | rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has taught me, that by meditating, I cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||Pause||
Your Name is the Life of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂਹੈ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੀ ਸੁਨਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੂਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: toohai mantree suneh prabh toohai sabh kichh karanaihaaraa |
lines.english: You are Your own advisor; You hear everything, God, and You do everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਦਾਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਭੁਗਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਇਹੁ ਜੰਤੁ ਵਿਚਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: too aape daataa aape bhugataa kiaa ihu jant vichaaraa |2|
lines.english: You Yourself are the Giver, and You Yourself are the Enjoyer. What can this poor creature do? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਤੇਰੇ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa gun tere aakh vakhaanee keemat kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: Which of Your Glorious Virtues should I describe and speak of? Your value cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸ੍ਵਾਮੀ ਪਤਿ ਮਤਿ ਕੀਨੀ ਪੂਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: dhaar anugrahu aap prabh svaamee pat mat keenee pooree |
lines.english: Granting His Grace, God my Lord and Master Himself saved my honor, and my intellect has been made perfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਿ ਪੇਖਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਅਚਰਜੁ ਤੁਮਹਿ ਵਡਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: pekh pekh jeevai prabh apanaa acharaj tumeh vaddaaee |3|
lines.english: I live by beholding, beholding You, O God. Your glorious greatness is wonderful and amazing! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਬਾਛਉ ਸੰਤਾ ਧੂਰੀ ॥੪॥੧੩॥੬੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa naanak balihaaree baachhau santaa dhooree |4|13|63|
lines.english: Forever and ever, Nanak is a sacrifice, longing for the dust of the feet of the Saints. ||4||13||63||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
I bow in reverence to the Perfect Guru.
God has resolved all my affairs.
God has perfectly preserved my honor. ||1||
The Lord has showered me with His Mercy.
He has become the help and support of His slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਕੀਨੇ ਕਰਤੈ ਊਣੀ ਬਾਤ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath keene karatai aoonee baat na kaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: The Creator has achieved all my goals, and now, nothing is lacking. ||Pause||
The Creator Lord has caused the pool of nectar to be constructed.
The wealth of Maya follows in my footsteps,
This is pleasing to my Perfect True Guru. ||2||
and now, nothing is lacking at all.
Remembering, remembering the Merciful Lord in meditation,
all beings have become kind and compassionate to me.
Hail! Hail to the Lord of the world,
who created the perfect creation. ||3||
You are my Great Lord and Master.
These blessings and wealth are Yours.
Servant Nanak has meditated on the One Lord;
he has obtained the fruitful rewards for all good deeds. ||4||14||64||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Dho-Padhay:
One becomes immaculately pure, taking this cleansing bath.
all sins are erased.
The Perfect Guru has bestowed this gift. ||1||
Bathing in the nectar tank of Ram Das,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੀ ਸਲਾਮਤਿ ਸਭਿ ਥੋਕ ਉਬਾਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sahee salaamat sabh thok ubaare gur kaa sabad veechaare | rahaau |
lines.english: Everything is safe and sound, as we contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||Pause||
God has blessed all with peace and pleasure.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, filth is washed off.
The Supreme Lord God has become our friend and helper.
He has found God, the Primal Being. ||2||1||65||
Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
The Supreme Lord God has established that home,
In which He comes to mind.
